column2: User Story 2 - Real-Time Collaborative Note Editing
column16: Edits from different users are merged without conflicts or overwriting;Implement real-time synchronization for note changes;Add note version history
column18:
Priority: Urgent
Description:
Multiple users can edit the same note at the same time, with changes appearing instantly for everyone. The system ensures no data is lost and keeps track of all edits.
Acceptance Criteria:
Changes made by one user are instantly visible to all users
Edits from different users are merged without conflicts or overwriting
Version history is maintained for each note with rollback support
Estimation: Medium (7 days)

column16: Set up role management: admin, user, guest;Make workspace screen after login;Implement email/password registration and login
column18:
Priority: Urgent
Description:
Users should be able to sign up, log in securely, and access their workspaces. Each user will have a role (admin, user, or guest) that controls their permissions.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can register and log in using email and password
Role-based access is implemented (admin, user, guest)
Users can select and switch between workspaces after logging in
Estimation: Medium (5 days)

column16: Link tasks and notes to milestones;Show milestone progress in dashboard;Create milestones with name, deadline, description;Allow milestone edits and history tracking
column18:
Priority: Medium
Description:
Admins can create milestones for the workspace, link them with tasks and notes, and track overall progress through a dashboard.
Acceptance Criteria:
Admins can create and manage milestones with name, deadline, and description
Tasks and notes can be linked to specific milestones
Dashboard shows milestone progress and upcoming deadlines
Team members are notified when milestones are completed or delayed
Estimation: Medium (3 days)

column16: Approvers can approve/reject, add comments;Let users flag notes for approval;Record version history for rejected notes
column18:
Priority: Medium
Description:
Important notes go through an approval process before being shared with everyone. Users can request approval, and approvers can review, accept, or reject notes.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can mark notes for approval
Approvers receive notifications and can approve or reject notes
Rejected notes keep their version history for edits
Approved notes become visible to all workspace members
Estimation: Medium (4 days)

column16: Add widgets for workspace stats and shortcuts;Persist user dashboard settings
column18:
Priority: Important
Description:
Each workspace has a dashboard that shows useful information like recent notes, active users, and workspace stats. Users can customize the layout and choose which widgets to display.
Acceptance Criteria:
Dashboard includes widgets for activity, stats, and shortcuts
Recent notes and users are shown
Estimation: Medium (4 days)

column2: User Story 3 - Workspace Management (Create, Invite, Settings)
column16: Grant and update workspace permissions;Send invitations to collaborators through invite link;Allow workspace creation, renaming
column18:
Priority: Important
Description:
Users can manage their workspaces by creating, renaming, or deleting them. They can invite others to collaborate, customize the workspace appearance, and control permissions.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can create, rename, and delete workspaces
Users can invite others via email and assign roles/permissions
Workspace avatar and color/theme can be customized
Estimation: Medium (4 days)

column2: User Story 7 - Workspace Changelog & Annotated Release Notes
column16: Allow manual annotation/commenting for changelog entries;Log major workspace actions (note, task, milestone changes); Export changelog (PDF, CSV, if needed)
column18:
Priority: Important
Description:
The workspace keeps a record of important activities and updates. Admins can add notes for clarity, and users can view or filter changes easily.
Acceptance Criteria:
Changelog is automatically updated for key actions (note edits, task updates, milestone changes)
Admins can add notes or descriptions to changelog entries
Users can search and filter the changelog by date, action, or user
Users receive notifications for important updates if subscribed
Estimation: Medium (3 days)

column2: User Story 8 - Intelligent Note Tagging & Search
column16: Search/filter notes by tags/topics;Allow manual tag addition/editing
column18:
Priority: Medium
Description:
Notes are automatically tagged based on their content, making it easier for users to organize and find information. Users can also manage tags and quickly search notes by topics.
Acceptance Criteria:
Notes are automatically tagged when saved based on content
Users can manually add, edit, or remove tags
Users can search and filter notes using tags or topics
Estimation: Medium (3 days)

column16: Add tasks from notes and workspace dashboard;Track task updates/changes;Assign tasks to users and set due dates;Display task progress/status
column18:
Priority: Important
Description:
Users can create and manage tasks within notes or the workspace dashboard. Tasks can be assigned to team members, tracked by status, and users receive notifications for updates.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can create tasks in notes or on the dashboard
Tasks can be assigned with due dates
Task status can be updated (To Do, Doing, Done)
Estimation: Medium (5 days)

column2: User Story 9 - Note Linking & Relationship Visualization
column16: Highlight dependencies and interconnected notes;Build relationship graph visualization UI;Enable linking from one note to another
column18:
Priority: Medium
Description:
Users can connect notes with each other and view how they are related through a visual graph, making it easier to understand dependencies and relationships.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can link one note to another within the workspace
A visual graph shows how notes are connected
Users can view and manage dependencies between notes
Estimation: Medium (4 days)
